subject: Mathematics
title: Cantor: The Man Who Tamed Infinity
description: Learn Cantor: The Man Who Tamed Infinity in one minute.

hook.text: Georg Cantor proved that some infinities are larger than others. The math world erupted.

buildup.text: He showed there are more real numbers than natural numbers—infinity comes in different sizes.

discovery.text: His diagonal argument was elegant and irrefutable. No one could find a flaw.

twist.text: Powerful mathematicians, especially Kronecker, attacked his work as madness. Cantor suffered breakdowns.

climax.text: He spent his final years in a sanatorium. Today his set theory is the foundation of all modern math.

punchline.text: He counted the uncountable and paid with his sanity.

quiz.question: What did Cantor prove about infinity?
options: That some infinities are larger than others
